raw_source.title: [远程/上海] Arkreen Network is looking for Front End Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About 
Arkreen Network is an Web3-powered infrastructure for globally-distributed renewable energy resources connection and monetization to enable carbon-reduction applications.
- We target at the distributed renewable energy equipment, especially for the residential solar panels, cuz it's a longtail unserved market for REC issuance, which means billions dollars opportunity for new technology/economic model as Web3.
- arkreen sits in the intersection of Proof of Physical Work(PoPW) and Regenerative Finance(ReFi). arkreen uses PoPW to bootstrap an infra for global distributed renewable energy equipment and then converts renewable energy data into REC for anyone to offset their carbon footprints. REC is a mature market with limited supply while huge and increasing demand, so the external income for arkreen is organic and ready. Energy sector is under a mega-transition into renewable with trillions dollars opportunities, and REC market is already a hundreds of billions of market grows at compounding rate.

## Responsibilities

1.  Develop new user facing features
2.  Write reusable code and libraries
3.  Enhance application for maximum speed and scalability
4.  Debug, profile, and search for bottlenecks in rendering
5.  Bridge the gap between graphic design and technical implementation
6.  Define how applications look and how they work
7.  Translate UI/UX design wireframes into actual code
8.  Work closely with the leadership team on the product direction 

## Requirements

1. Passion about what decentralization technology can offer to humanity
2. Insatiable curiosity of the industry and self-motivation to pursue researching every new idea that floats across the industry
3. Strong engineering fundamentals
4. 3+ years of experience in a similar role
5. Strong experience with software delivery and taking a set of requirements towards full implementation with minimal guidance
6. Javascript frameworks like React, Redux, Angular, and Vue
7. Depth of knowledge and implementation experience
8. Ability to communicate effectively and work collaboratively with the team and internal/external organizations
9. Strong understanding of asynchronous request handling, partial page updates, and AJAX
10. Proficient in code versioning tools such as Git
11. Experience in agile software development
12. Familiarity with Web3js
13. Excellent problem solving and analytical thinking skills

## Nice to Haves

1. Experience with Ethereum web3 technologies, specially on mobile
2. Knowledge/experience on mobile cryptocurrencies/wallets
3. Work experience in Mobility/IoT space
4. Ability to explain abstract technical concepts in an easy to understand manner

## Job Nature

- Full-time


## Salary and Benefits
3500~5000u/month

## Location
Remote/Shanghai

## Contact
TG: GreaPapa

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
